A. Freeform text summary of the failure:
The agent computed the chi-square on female Bladder urothelial carcinoma (BLCA) patients instead of female BRCA patients, as shown by querying and extracting barcodes from "Bladder urothelial carcinoma" (calls function-call-2705041559606800503, -6025066862729129454) and using them to fetch CDH1 mutations (function-call-654917665174747109) and build the contingency table (function-call-11569624093825320414, -8670656491014213442), resulting in an answer for the wrong cohort.
B. Failure modes encountered:
FM1: no
FM2: no
FM3: yes
FM4: no
@@
